meta.title: From SHANNON to LUCID
meta.message: Shannon Lucid is a U.S. astronaut and biochemist. On this day in 1996, she transferred to the Russian space station Mir, becoming the first female U.S. astronaut to live on a space station She stayed in space for almost six months. Until 2007, she held the record for longest time lived in space by an American and by a woman. She was the first woman awarded the Congressional Space Medal of Honor, when President Clinton bestowed the honor on her in 1996.

ladder.clue: The River <> is in this country
Change the second letter of <> to get a country
Swap a bigram (two letters) in <> for a single letter to get part of a tree
Double a letter in <> to get kind
Drop the last sound of <> to get a palindromic name
Drop the O from <> and anagram to become understandable
